'''lozhathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stable|stable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stable|stable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lozhathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lozhathithi|lozhathithi]] || [[word:lozhathiji|lozhathiji]] || [[word:lozhathishi|lozhathishi]] || [[word:lozhathiki|lozhathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lozhathuthuthu|lozhathuthuthu]] || [[word:lozhathujuju|lozhathujuju]] || [[word:lozhathushushu|lozhathushushu]] || [[word:lozhathukuku|lozhathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lozhathuthu|lozhathuthu]] || [[word:lozhathuju|lozhathuju]] || [[word:lozhathushu|lozhathushu]] || [[word:lozhathuku|lozhathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lozhathufthuf|lozhathufthuf]] || [[word:lozhathufjuf|lozhathufjuf]] || [[word:lozhathufshuf|lozhathufshuf]] || [[word:lozhathufkuf|lozhathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lozhathethe|lozhathethe]] || [[word:lozhatheje|lozhatheje]] || [[word:lozhatheshe|lozhatheshe]] || [[word:lozhatheke|lozhatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lozhathothotho|lozhathothotho]] || [[word:lozhathojojo|lozhathojojo]] || [[word:lozhathoshosho|lozhathoshosho]] || [[word:lozhathokoko|lozhathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lozhathotho|lozhathotho]] || [[word:lozhathojo|lozhathojo]] || [[word:lozhathosho|lozhathosho]] || [[word:lozhathoko|lozhathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lozhathofthof|lozhathofthof]] || [[word:lozhathofjof|lozhathofjof]] || [[word:lozhathofshof|lozhathofshof]] || [[word:lozhathofkof|lozhathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfthĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfjĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfshĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfkĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfthĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfjĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfshĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfkĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfthĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfjĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfshĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lozhathĂŻfkĂŻf|lozhathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lozhathĂŠthĂŠ|lozhathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lozhathĂŠjĂŠ|lozhathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lozhathĂŠshĂŠ|lozhathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lozhathĂŠkĂŠ|lozhathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lozhathathatha|lozhathathatha]] || [[word:lozhathajaja|lozhathajaja]] || [[word:lozhathashasha|lozhathashasha]] || [[word:lozhathakaka|lozhathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lozhathatha|lozhathatha]] || [[word:lozhathaja|lozhathaja]] || [[word:lozhathasha|lozhathasha]] || [[word:lozhathaka|lozhathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lozhathafthaf|lozhathafthaf]] || [[word:lozhathafjaf|lozhathafjaf]] || [[word:lozhathafshaf|lozhathafshaf]] || [[word:lozhathafkaf|lozhathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lozhathasha|lozhathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lozhathshĂ«sha|lozhathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lozhathrosha|lozhathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lozhathmusha|lozhathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lozhathyasha|lozhathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golozhathnkshĂ«sha|golozhathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golozhathnkrosha|golozhathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golozhathnkmusha|golozhathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golozhathnkyasha|golozhathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lozhazhathasha|lozhazhathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lozhazhathshĂ«sha|lozhazhathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lozhazhathrosha|lozhazhathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lozhazhathmusha|lozhazhathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lozhazhathyasha|lozhazhathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golozhazhathnkshĂ«sha|golozhazhathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golozhazhathnkrosha|golozhazhathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golozhazhathnkmusha|golozhazhathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golozhazhathnkyasha|golozhazhathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lezhĂŠthasha|lezhĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lezhĂŠthshĂ«sha|lezhĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lezhĂŠthrosha|lezhĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lezhĂŠthmusha|lezhĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lezhĂŠthyasha|lezhĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golezhĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|golezhĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golezhĂŠthnkrosha|golezhĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golezhĂŠthnkmusha|golezhĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golezhĂŠthnkyasha|golezhĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lozhfathasha|lozhfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lozhfathshĂ«sha|lozhfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lozhfathrosha|lozhfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lozhfathmusha|lozhfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lozhfathyasha|lozhfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golozhfathnkshĂ«sha|golozhfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golozhfathnkrosha|golozhfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golozhfathnkmusha|golozhfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golozhfathnkyasha|golozhfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
